case_title: COSTA, JOSEPH vs. JEFFREY RICH, IND. & DBA CITY OPTIX OPTOMETRIC

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF COSTA, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT JEFFREY RICH, IND. & DBA CITY OPTIX OPTOMETRIC
